title: Generate finance control packet from invoice and cost evidence
given: Invoice audit intakes, pricing snapshots, shipment financial snapshots, cost lines, RFQ procurement plans, and customer service briefs exist.
when: The user creates a finance control packet.
then: The assistant persists an AssistantFinancePacket with variance summary, margin leakage, dispute queue, accrual risk, evidence IDs, and a board-ready summary.

title: Prioritize disputes and accrual exposure
given: Invoice audit results include red variance lines and invoices not approved for accounting.
then: Dispute amount, accrual amount, red-line count, and unapproved accounting count are surfaced as finance risk signals.

title: Queue finance review without accounting mutation
given: A finance packet has dispute, leakage, or accrual risk.
then: An assistant action queue item and audit event are created, but no accounting export, dispute submission, or shipment cost mutation happens automatically.
